info.name: Shopify Retrieve a list of products

params.name: ids
params.description: Comma-separated list of product IDs to retrieve

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of results to return (max 250, default 50)

params.name: since_id
params.description: Return products after the specified ID

params.name: fields
params.description: Comma-separated list of fields to include in the response

params.name: created_at_min
params.description: Show products created after this date (ISO 8601)

params.name: created_at_max
params.description: Show products created before this date (ISO 8601)

params.name: updated_at_min
params.description: Show products updated after this date (ISO 8601)

params.name: updated_at_max
params.description: Show products updated before this date (ISO 8601)

items.docs: Retrieves a list of products. Results can be filtered by collection, product type, vendor, creation date, update date, publication status, and other criteria. Returns up to 250 products per page.
Creates a new product. You can include product variants and images in the same request. If no variants are specified a default variant is created automatically.

info.name: Shopify Retrieve a count of products

params.name: created_at_min
params.description: Count products created after this date

params.name: updated_at_min
params.description: Count products updated after this date

items.docs: Retrieves a count of products matching the specified criteria.

params.name: fields
params.description: Comma-separated list of fields to include

items.docs: Retrieves a single product by its ID, including variants, images, and options.
Updates an existing product and any of its variants and images.
Deletes a product and all associated variants and images.

info.name: Shopify Retrieve a list of product images

params.name: since_id
params.description: Return images after the specified ID

params.name: fields
params.description: Comma-separated list of fields to include

items.docs: Retrieves all images for a given product.
Creates a new image for a product. Images can be provided as a URL or a base64-encoded attachment.

info.name: Shopify Retrieve a count of product images

items.docs: Retrieves a count of images for a given product.

info.name: Shopify Retrieve a single product image

items.docs: Retrieves a single image for a product by its ID.
Updates an existing product image. Can update position, alt text, and variant associations.
Deletes an image from a product.

info.name: Shopify Retrieve a list of product variants

params.name: since_id
params.description: Return variants after the specified ID

params.name: fields
params.description: Comma-separated list of fields to include

items.docs: Retrieves all variants for a given product.
Creates a new variant for a product.

info.name: Shopify Retrieve a list of customers

params.name: since_id
params.description: Return customers after the specified ID

params.name: created_at_min
params.description: Show customers created after this date

params.name: created_at_max
params.description: Show customers created before this date

params.name: updated_at_min
params.description: Show customers updated after this date

params.name: updated_at_max
params.description: Show customers updated before this date

params.name: fields
params.description: Comma-separated list of fields to include

items.docs: Retrieves a list of customers. Results can be filtered by creation date, update date, and other criteria. Returns up to 250 customers.
Creates a new customer record. Sends a welcome email if send_email_welcome is true.

info.name: Shopify Retrieve a count of customers

items.docs: Retrieves a count of all customers.

params.name: fields
params.description: Comma-separated list of fields to include

items.docs: Searches for customers matching a supplied query. Supports searching by name, email, phone, and other fields.

params.name: fields
params.description: Comma-separated list of fields to include

items.docs: Retrieves a single customer by ID.
Updates an existing customer record.

info.name: Shopify Retrieve orders for a customer

items.docs: Retrieves all orders belonging to a specific customer.

info.name: Shopify Retrieve addresses for a customer

items.docs: Retrieves all addresses for a customer.
Creates a new address for a customer.

info.name: Shopify Retrieve a list of orders

params.name: since_id
params.description: Return orders after the specified ID

params.name: created_at_min
params.description: Show orders created after this date

params.name: created_at_max
params.description: Show orders created before this date

params.name: updated_at_min
params.description: Show orders updated after this date

params.name: updated_at_max
params.description: Show orders updated before this date

params.name: fields
params.description: Comma-separated list of fields to include

items.docs: Retrieves a list of orders. By default only orders from the last 60 days are returned. Use status=any to include all statuses.
Creates an order. Orders created via the API do not trigger payment processing. Use the order to represent sales from external channels.

info.name: Shopify Retrieve a count of orders

params.name: created_at_min
params.description: Count orders created after this date

params.name: updated_at_min
params.description: Count orders updated after this date

items.docs: Retrieves a count of orders matching the given criteria.

params.name: fields
params.description: Comma-separated list of fields to include

items.docs: Retrieves a single order by ID including line items and details.
Updates an existing order. Note, tags, email, phone, shipping address, and metafields can be updated.
Deletes an order. Orders that interact with an online gateway cannot be deleted.
Cancels an order. Optionally refunds payment and restocks items.
Closes an order, marking it as completed.
Re-opens a previously closed order.

info.name: Shopify Retrieve fulfillment orders for an order

items.docs: Retrieves all fulfillment orders associated with a given order.
Creates a fulfillment for one or more fulfillment orders.

info.name: Shopify Update tracking information for a fulfillment

items.docs: Updates the tracking information for a fulfillment.
Cancels a fulfillment.

info.name: Shopify Retrieve a list of inventory items

params.name: ids
params.description: Comma-separated list of inventory item IDs

items.docs: Retrieves a list of inventory items. Items must be fetched by IDs.

info.name: Shopify Retrieve a single inventory item

params.name: inventory_item_id
params.description: The ID of the inventory item

items.docs: Retrieves a single inventory item by ID.

params.name: inventory_item_id
params.description: The ID of the inventory item

items.docs: Updates an existing inventory item.
Retrieves inventory levels for items at locations. Filter by inventory_item_ids or location_ids.

info.name: Shopify Set inventory level for an item at a location

items.docs: Sets the inventory level for an inventory item at a location.

info.name: Shopify Retrieve inventory levels for a location

items.docs: Retrieves all inventory levels at a specific location.

info.name: Shopify Retrieve a list of locations

items.docs: Retrieves a list of all locations for a shop.

info.name: Shopify Retrieve a count of locations

items.docs: Retrieves a count of locations for a shop.
Retrieves a single location by ID.

params.name: fields
params.description: Comma-separated list of fields to include

items.docs: Retrieves a single collection by ID including its metadata.

info.name: Shopify Retrieve products in a collection

items.docs: Retrieves a list of products belonging to a collection.

info.name: Shopify Retrieve a list of custom collections

params.name: since_id
params.description: Return collections after the specified ID

params.name: fields
params.description: Comma-separated list of fields to include

items.docs: Retrieves a list of custom (manual) collections.
Creates a new custom (manual) collection.

info.name: Shopify Retrieve a list of smart collections

params.name: since_id
params.description: Return collections after the specified ID

params.name: fields
params.description: Comma-separated list of fields to include

items.docs: Retrieves a list of smart (automated) collections.

info.name: Shopify Retrieve a list of webhooks

params.name: since_id
params.description: Return webhooks after the specified ID

params.name: fields
params.description: Comma-separated list of fields to include

items.docs: Retrieves a list of webhook subscriptions for the app.
Creates a new webhook subscription. When the specified event occurs Shopify sends an HTTP POST to the provided address.

info.name: Shopify Retrieve a count of webhooks

params.name: topic
params.description: Count webhooks for a specific topic

items.docs: Retrieves a count of existing webhook subscriptions.
Retrieves a single webhook subscription by ID.
Updates an existing webhook subscription.
Deletes a webhook subscription.

params.name: fields
params.description: Comma-separated list of fields to include

items.docs: Retrieves the shop's configuration including name, domain, currency, timezone, plan, and address information.

info.name: Shopify Retrieve access scopes for the access token

items.docs: Retrieves a list of access scopes associated with the current access token.
